PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList 'run','dev' -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\arrow_dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\arrow_dev.err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\arrow_dev.log" -Tail 15; Write-Host "PID=$\($p.Id\)")

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Hub\\Desktop\\in work projects\\kassa"; & cmd /c "npm run dev" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173/setup" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), length=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not reachable on 5173: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; Receive-Job $job | Select-Object -Last 15 })

PowerShell(Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.StartTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-3\) } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "cleaned")
PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|warning" | Group-Object { \($_ -split '\\s{2,}'\)[2] } | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object Count, Name -First 12)

PowerShell(npm run lint 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "react-hooks/|typescript-eslint/|react-refresh/" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table Count, Name -AutoSize)

PowerShell(npx eslint . --format json 2>$null | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\lint.json"; $r = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\lint.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $rules = @{}; $files = @{}; foreach \($f in $r\) { foreach \($m in $f.messages\) { $rules[$m.ruleId] = 1 + $rules[$m.ruleId]; $fn = Split-Path $f.filePath -Leaf; $files[$fn] = 1 + $files[$fn] } }; Write-Host "=== BY RULE ==="; $rules.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Value -Descending | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Value\)`t$\($_.Key\)" }; Write-Host "=== BY FILE ==="; $files.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Value -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Value\)`t$\($_.Key\)" })

PowerShell($existing = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($existing\) { Write-Host "Уже слушает порт 5173 \(PID $\($existing.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { Write-Host "5173 свободен, запускаю" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — работает" } catch { Write-Host "Не отвечает: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false; Write-Host "killed PID $_" } } else { Write-Host "nothing on 5173" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "http://localhost:5173/ — HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "порт занят, но не отвечает: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Host "не запущен" })
